name: Basketball Superstars
author: Poki
description: Basketball Superstars is your ticket to the Court of Champions! Create your own player, train up, and dominate in fast-paced, action-packed basketball matches. Boost your skills, outplay your rivals, and rise to the top as the ultimate hoops legend. Ready to call the shots and claim the court? How to play Basketball Superstars? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Shoot, dunk, steal, and block: Space bar Who created Basketball Superstars? Basketball Superstars is created by Virtual Projects. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Basketball Superstars for free? You can play Basketball Superstars for free on Poki. Can I play Basketball Superstars on mobile devices and desktop? Basketball Superstars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
